The Codiaeum variegatum, commonly known as the Croton, is a flowering plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of the Croton plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
